## Change boundaries

- [ ] Schema/solution
- [ ] Custom API/plug-in
- [ ] PCF/client
- [ ] Integration/automation
- [ ] Documentation/tooling

## Validation

- [ ] Acceptance criteria are linked and satisfied
- [ ] Unit/contract/integration tests are updated as applicable
- [ ] Security, performance, telemetry, and accessibility impacts are assessed
- [ ] Solution import/upgrade and rollback impact is assessed
- [ ] No secrets, generated packages, or production data are committed
- [ ] Task and implementation evidence records are updated

## Deployment and rollback

Describe configuration changes, deployment order, smoke checks, compatibility considerations, and rollback.
